name: Ph.D. in Industrial Engineering

dimensions.name: Curriculum coherence & progression
dimensions.justification: No courses are surfaced (sampleCourses empty, referencedCourses 0), so although a Ph.D. is legitimately research-centric with an individualized program of study, the page documents none of the expected doctoral milestones (advanced coursework, qualifying/comprehensive examination, dissertation research) and no progression can be traced.
dimensions.suggestion: Surface the doctoral structure: advanced coursework beyond the M.S., the qualifying/comprehensive exam sequence, and the dissertation-research vehicle.

dimensions.name: Prerequisite structure health
dimensions.justification: deepestPrereqChain is 0 and missingCourseCount is 0 only because nothing is referenced; a doctorate presumes advanced coursework building on a master's foundation, but no such structure is shown.
dimensions.suggestion: List the advanced IE courses and research-methods requirements that build on M.S.-level preparation so a doctoral prerequisite structure is visible.

dimensions.name: Learning outcomes & objectives
dimensions.justification: No program-level learning outcomes or objectives are present; a doctoral applicant is given nothing about the research competencies, breadth areas, or dissertation expectations the program sets.
dimensions.suggestion: Publish 3-5 doctoral learning outcomes (independent research, breadth across IE domains, scholarly communication, and dissertation defense).

dimensions.name: Credit distribution & balance
dimensions.justification: statedTotalCredits is null and no plan is parsed, so the post-master's/post-bachelor's credit requirement and the split between coursework and dissertation-research credits are entirely unstated, which is a real transparency gap even for a research degree.
dimensions.suggestion: State the total credit requirement and the coursework-versus-dissertation-credit split for the doctorate.

dimensions.name: Presentation & clarity
dimensions.justification: The catalog entry is effectively blank, no courses, null credits, and no description of qualifying exams, breadth areas, or the dissertation, so it cannot orient a prospective doctoral student, even allowing that Ph.D. pages are often narrative rather than course-listed.
dimensions.suggestion: Rebuild the entry with a narrative of admission expectations, milestones (quals, proposal, defense), and available research areas.

dimensions.name: Industry & currency relevance
dimensions.justification: With nothing displayed, research currency cannot be assessed; IE doctoral research (analytics, healthcare systems, supply chain, human factors) is highly relevant, but the page demonstrates none of the program's active research directions.
dimensions.suggestion: List active faculty research areas and representative advanced courses so the doctorate's research relevance is demonstrable.

descriptionQuality.justification: No course descriptions are present (sampleCourses empty), so description quality cannot be evaluated and is scored at the floor.

prerequisiteClarity.justification: No prerequisites or course references exist to assess; missingCourseCount is 0 only because the page references nothing, so prerequisite clarity cannot be confirmed.

missingTopics.rationale: The gating milestone of any doctorate is undocumented, leaving applicants unclear on breadth expectations.
No advanced IE courses (optimization, stochastic processes, statistics) are listed to define doctoral breadth.
No dissertation/research-credit course is shown, leaving the culminating scholarly work undocumented.
Doctoral-level methods training is expected but not represented on the page.

missingTopics.topic: Responsible conduct of research and scholarly communication
missingTopics.rationale: Ethics/RCR and dissertation-writing/publication expectations are standard doctoral requirements that are absent.

emergingTrends.trend: Data science and machine learning for IE research
emergingTrends.rationale: Doctoral IE research increasingly centers on analytics and statistical learning; the program should foreground these directions.
Applying IE optimization and human-factors methods to health-system delivery is a leading doctoral research frontier.
Model-based, real-time optimization of production and service systems is a major IE research direction.
Human-automation teaming builds on the department's human-factors strength and is a growing research area.
Resilience, sustainability, and risk in global supply networks are high-impact IE research themes.

topSuggestions: Rebuild the doctoral catalog page to document milestones: qualifying/comprehensive exams, dissertation proposal, and defense.
State the total credit requirement and the coursework-versus-dissertation split (currently null).
Publish 3-5 doctoral learning outcomes describing research and breadth competencies.
List advanced coursework and breadth areas that build on M.S.-level preparation.
Surface active faculty research areas so the doctorate's research relevance and currency are visible.
